urlset:
{{ base_url }}/ daily 1.0
{{ base_url }}/sitemap weekly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/about monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/contact monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/pricing weekly 0.9
{{ base_url }}/blogs daily 0.9
{{ base_url }}/webstories daily 0.9
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-url monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-email monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-wifi monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-sms monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-event monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-call monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-whatsapp monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-vcard monthly 0.8
{{ base_url }}/services/qr-code-for-text monthly 0.8
{% for blog in blogs %}
{{ base_url }}/blog/{{ blog.slug }} {% if blog.updated_at %} {{ blog.updated_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }} {% endif %} weekly 0.7
{% endfor %}
{% for story in webstories %}
{{ base_url }}/webstory/{{ story.slug }} {% if story.updated_at %} {{ story.updated_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') }} {% endif %} weekly 0.7
{% endfor %}
